footer.copyright: © 2026 {coupleNames}. Can't wait to celebrate with you!

reception.description: After the ceremony there will be coffee and cake, followed by dinner and dancing.

dressCode.complementary: A dark suit means a matching suit jacket and trousers in the same fabric and style. The color should be black, dark gray, or dark blue. The shirt should be light, and a tie or bow tie should be worn. You may also choose to wear a dress; the color is optional, but it should give a dressed-up impression, preferably in a fine material. The dress should fall below the knees and may go all the way down to the ankles. A slit is allowed.

directions.title: Directions
directions.intro: For those unfamiliar with the area, here is how to find us. We will arrange transportation between the church and the reception.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.intro: Please let us know if you can make it by June 30th, 2026.

dayBefore.title: The day before - September 18
dayBefore.description: We are planning a self-paid dinner at Hotel Starby inspired by our first date, so we can reserve a table for those who want and can join.
dayBefore.question: Would you like to join?
